# Robots policy for the elevator-core docs + playground.
# Both surfaces are deployed under https://andymai.github.io/elevator-core/.
# Crawlers are welcome on every public page; we publish a sitemap that
# enumerates the book chapters and the playground entry point.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# /bench/ is a nightly benchmark dashboard pushed by github-action-benchmark.
# It's auto-generated, JS-rendered, and not useful for general SEO.
Disallow: /elevator-core/bench/

Sitemap: https://andymai.github.io/elevator-core/sitemap.xml
